observations.text: The native integrity inspector emitted unversioned-serialization observations for CRONOS persistence and chain code.
The audit trace records artifact writes for verification, coverage, metrics, and report, followed by seal creation.

hypotheses.text: Unversioned serialized persistence or chain records may create an incompatible replay or verification boundary after schema evolution.
The native seal may establish artifact integrity but cannot by itself establish semantic correctness of the findings or unexecuted persistence behavior.

deductions.text: The static observations prove only the detected serialization pattern, not a failing migration, reachable incompatible record, or broken hash-chain mechanism.
Artifact ordering in the audit trace supports provenance of the native artifact set; it is not an execution of CRONOS persistence/replay tests.

evidence.description: Native pipeline artifact and sealing events.
Integrity-inspector CODE FACT observations, with RUNTIME_NOT_EXECUTED provenance.

work_product.decision: ABSTAIN: no external defect is promoted. Both candidates remain UNDETERMINED because this review has no executed induction establishing reachability, mechanism, compatibility failure, or replay/verification failure.

adi.statement: A serializer lacking an explicit version can be a candidate explanation for future replay or schema-compatibility failure.
If that candidate is material, an old persisted record and a changed schema/decoder would demonstrably fail or misinterpret during replay or verification.
NOT EXECUTED. Native provenance is AST and RUNTIME_NOT_EXECUTED; therefore the candidate remains UNDETERMINED.
A seal created after native artifact writes can support tamper-evidence for those artifacts.
If seal verification succeeds, it establishes chain/hash integrity for the sealed artifact, not the truth of analytical conclusions or behavior never executed.
NOT EXECUTED by this reviewer. The trace records native seal creation, but no independent semantic or persistence execution was performed; status remains UNDETERMINED.
